summary: Prompt-box media roles: krea2Edit 2-image chip #1 lost on round-trip + reuse loads 1. Root cause traced: routes/projects.js _snapshotRoleForMediaItem hardcodes startFrame/endFrame by index, overwriting inputImage/inputImage2 in the sidecar. Fix = role-agnostic snapshot/restore/reuse plumbing; user wants a collection (images:[...]) model. Card + plan for fresh session.
Phase 0 investigation complete (reuse traced, data-shape=list-of-dicts w/ op-slot-key role tag, migration=fix-at-source+light). Starting Phase 1.
Phases 1+2 done (source fix role-agnostic + restore op-cap fix). Node-verified 3 cases. Phase 3 real-app verify needs user.
Root snap found (user): _pickFallbackOp picked first image op (i2i cap1) ignoring chip count, overriding restore op-fit on every return-nav. Made count-aware (2 imgs -> krea2Edit). Node-verified.

Code done + core UX verified live (chips survive round-trip+reuse; i2v frame injection console-proven correct). Maturity -> validating. Wan i2v e2e pending other agent workflow sync (block_if_empty node input, NOT MPI-295). Debug logs stripped.
User-verified complete: chips survive round-trip+reuse, Wan i2v start+end and start-only both run. Committed df1ecad1. block_if_empty workflow-sync = separate task.
